description: Comprehensive Earth System Model with a focus on understanding the diverse forcings on the climate system and the climate response and impacts. Developed following pioneering work in 1980's and 1990's at NASA GISS. Now uses a cubed-sphere atmosphere and high model top (~85km) and GISS Ocean/sea ice modules. Optional inclusion of MATRIX aerosols, interactive chemistry (based on PUCCINI), ocean bio-geochemistry (NOBM), full carbon cycle, and PISM land ice. Multiple physics versions are possible based on equiprobable ML tuning to observations (varying in a set of atmospheric parameters).
